name: data_analyzer
description: Analyze tabular data (CSV/JSON/Excel) with aggregation, filtering, and visualization. Supports pandas-based workflows for data cleaning, statistics, and reporting.

task.description: Analysis task: summarize, aggregate, filter, pivot, or visualize

data_path.description: Path to data file (CSV, JSON, or Excel)

group_by.description: Column to group by for aggregation

operation.description: Aggregation operation: sum, avg, count, min, max

output_format.description: Output format: json, csv, or text
